title: SNC TRUST DECLARES 2018 DISTRIBUTION
summary: The SNC Trust is headquartered in Nome, Alaska, and was recently approved by Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) Shareholders on September 22, 2018, at the 44th annual meeting. SNC’s Shareholders are the Trust’s beneficiaries, and SNC’s board of directors are the Trustees of the SNC Trust. The SNC Tr...
